title: SHAP-Based Signal Dimension Importance Audit
summary: After each batch of completed trades in the backtester, run SHAP (SHapley Additive exPlanations) on the ml_engine.py model to compute per-feature importance values for each signal dimension. Identify dimensions with mean |SHAP| < 0.01 across the last 100 trades — these are dead-weight features contributing noise rather than signal. Surface these in a weekly audit report written to the state folder, and provide a suggested reweighting vector. This allows the system to continuously self-diagnose signal quality degradation without manual inspection.
research_topic: Win Rate Improvement — Portfolio Construction, Trade Selectivity & Alternative Data
expected_impact: +3–5% win rate via signal pruning and reweighting
